scenario.title: Cancel an existing appointment
scenario.goal: Cancel an upcoming appointment and confirm whether it has been canceled.
must_try: Say you need to cancel an upcoming appointment.
Ask for confirmation that the cancellation is complete.
scenario.success_condition: The cancellation request is handled clearly and the call ends naturally.
good_bug_signals: The agent fails to confirm the cancellation outcome.
The agent redirects into scheduling without handling cancellation first.
The agent becomes unclear about whether the appointment still exists.

retell_llm_dynamic_variables.success_condition: The cancellation request is handled clearly and the call ends naturally.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.goal: Cancel an upcoming appointment and confirm whether it has been canceled.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.must_try: Say you need to cancel an upcoming appointment. | Ask for confirmation that the cancellation is complete.
retell_llm_dynamic_variables.title: Cancel an existing appointment

call_data.transcript:
Agent: Hi, 
User: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. 
User: Thanks for calling Tibbett Point Orthopaedics. Part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Maria? 
Agent: Yes, this is Maria Lopez.
User: For verification, may I have your date of birth? 
Agent: Sure, my date of birth is May 14, 1982.
User: The birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, I'll accept it. How can I help you today? 
Agent: Thank you. I need to cancel my upcoming appointment that’s scheduled for next Tuesday at 10:30 AM. Could you please confirm once it’s canceled?
User: Let me check your upcoming appointments and start the cancellation process for the one Tuesday at ten thirty AM. You have two upcoming appointments. One on Thursday, March nineteenth, at ten thirty AM and another on Friday, March twentieth at nine. Forty five AM. Both are new patient visits. Just to confirm, do you want to cancel the appointment on Thursday, March nineteenth at ten thirty AM? 
Agent: Yes, that’s correct—I’d like to cancel the appointment on Thursday, March nineteenth at 10:30 AM. Please let me know once it’s canceled.
User: Can you share the reason for canceling your appointment? 
User: For example, illness work conflict, transportation, insurance, or another reason. 
Agent: I have a work conflict and won’t be able to make it.
User: Your appointment on Thursday, March nineteenth at ten thirty AM with Abeker has been canceled due to a work conflict. Let me know if you need to reschedule or need help with anything else. 
Agent: Thank you for confirming the cancellation. That’s all I needed for now. Have a great day!
User: You're all set. Have a great day. 
Agent: Thanks again. Goodbye!

call_analysis.call_summary: The agent called to cancel an upcoming appointment scheduled for Thursday, March 19th at 10:30 AM due to a work conflict. The cancellation was confirmed by the user, and the call ended with both parties exchanging pleasantries.
